headline: Hormel Foods Corp (NYSE:HRL) Offers 5.64% Yield in Screener
summary: Hormel Foods offers a 5.64% dividend yield with a strong 10-year payment history. ChartMill's stock screen highlights HRL for its solid Health and Profitability ratings, though a high payout ratio requires monitoring.
